rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Quashing Deposition Subpoena To Bank Of Americaan Corp
rulings.Rulings: Respondents' Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena To Bank of America Corporation For The Production of Respondents' Personal Bank Records is granted. The right to financial privacy of respondents Terry Santos and Tomas Ticao outweighs the intrusion sought without good cause. (612/HEWLETT)
